projectsData.title: Portfolio
projectsData.description: Personal portfolio website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MDX.

projectsData.title: HealthPath
projectsData.description: A patient-facing healthcare platform for managing chronic conditions — featuring personalized meal planning, a provider network directory, and a health resource library.

projectsData.title: HomeLab
projectsData.description: A production-grade home server built on an M4 Mac Mini running a suite of self-hosted services behind a private VPN mesh. Designed around privacy, data ownership, and developer productivity — with zero reliance on third-party cloud subscriptions for core workflows.

projectsData.title: PixelShare
projectsData.description: A Django-based social media application where users can create posts, follow other users, and manage their profiles.

projectsData.title: Simple URL to Wikilinks replacer for Obsidian
projectsData.description: A Python script to convert markdown links to Obsidian wikilinks in a folder of notes. Good for anyone who saves a lot of clippings from the web with obsidian clipper or similar tool and wants to quickly link them together.
